theme.strategy: High-key photography aesthetic. Dominant white space with soft warm neutrals.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/20 hover:border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.glass: bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40 hover:bg-white/50 text-primary transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-sm

cards.style: bg-transparent hover:bg-secondary/30 transition-colors duration-500 group overflow-hidden
cards.image: aspect-[3/4] object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-primary/20 focus:border-primary px-0 py-4 rounded-none outline-none focus:ring-0 transition-colors duration-300 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

animations.parallax: Use Framer Motion for scroll-linked parallax effects on images

images.usage: Main Hero Background or Top Wedding Section

images.alt: Couple posing by black luxury car
Couple in front of spanish building
Newborn baby sleeping on white blanket

general: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (h1-h3). Use 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement smooth scrolling using Lenis or similar library if possible, otherwise CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
Ensure all images have a slight parallax effect on scroll using Framer Motion.
Navigation bar must be sticky, transparent initially, and turn white/glassmorphic on scroll.
Forms must use the minimal underlined style defined in components.inputs.
Buttons should have a subtle 'glow' or 'lift' effect on hover.
Use plenty of negative space (padding-y-32 for sections).

home: Hero: Full-screen image with centered elegant typography. Text: 'Capturing Timeless Moments'.
Intro Overlay: Fade in logo, then fade out to reveal hero.
Featured Services: Split screen or large cards (Wedding vs Baby). Hover expands the card.
Why Choose Us: 3-col grid with minimal icons and large typography.
services: Layout: Alternating zig-zag layout (Image Left/Text Right, then swap).
Pricing: clean, minimal cards, no borders, just typography and a 'Book Now' button.
portfolio: Use a Masonry or 'Tetris' grid layout.
Images should be clickable to open a lightbox (use a simple modal).
contact: Split layout: Map on one side (grayscale filter), Form on the other.
Form fields: Underlined style, no background.

admin_dashboard.style: Clean, sidebar layout. White background. Minimal shadows.
admin_dashboard.tables: Simple rows, hover effect, action menu on right.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use dark gradients. Keep it light and airy.
Do NOT use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Do NOT center align long paragraphs. Left align for readability.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
